violations.text: Beef, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours. Beef was reheated and placed in a more shallow pan to cool. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
Beans observed marked with a date exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Beef was placed hot in the freezer in container greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
Fly paper observed hanging from the ceiling in the basement in a food preparation area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the utensil drawer in the basement food prep area, the area beneath the grill, and the pan used to store packaged tortillas on the serving line have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

The shared oil recycling container outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Owner stated there is a meeting today to request their own smaller oil recycling bin. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The floor in the basement is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
